title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Basil Hawkins, Unknown person #10, Tsuru, Unknown person #11, Okobore Town Villagers as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: NAILS!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UWA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ZORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: NNN NGH... you bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: MI- Girl...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: toro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Samon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: > kyaoooooh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Slash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GWAA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sh-shall we keep chasing them!?

dialogue.speaker: Basil Hawkins
dialogue.text: Basil Hawkins- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The hirerophant card.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's a support card.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This means someone is going to help them escape.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my goodness, you two are very strong samural...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huuuh!!? Who the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you were able to fight off Basil Hawkins....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Earlier, I was saved by Sir Green.

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: My name is Tsuru.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, you hid inside this dog's tail the whole time!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may be overstepping my boundaries, but... that child... isn't she o-tama-chan from amigasa village...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Do you know her!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I thought, she must have drank the river water...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In that case, instead of finding a doctor, please bring her to my tea house....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would we go and drink tea at a time like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not that I know who this kid is, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got it wrong! We're going to boil a medicinal herb, effective against the river's poison, to give to her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will show you the way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Please, let me repay you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me tend to your wounds as well, Sir Green....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see!! Thank you very much...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: For helping us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAND COUNTRY: KURI okobore town. The town of leftovers.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: okobore Town. The Town of Leftovers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can't pay your rent, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let me help you out...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Hmmm? Kiku... c

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You'll never have to work again! You'll be able to eat the delicious food from the farm every day, and you'll never get hungry again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let me make you my wife!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My social standing is different from yours.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you aren't going to place an order, I'm going to have to ask you to leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want any of this shop's food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The dumplings, the tea... every- thing here is made with leftovers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, haven't you heard of me? I'm the yoko- zuna from the capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: Tea House poster girl

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm wano country's strongest Sumo Wrestler,

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
